title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend
text: FINDLAY, Ohio , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) has declared a dividend of $0.75 per share on common stock. The dividend is payable Sept.
